scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir dnaos-backend dev" "pnpm --dir dnaos-frontend dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir dnaos-backend build && pnpm --dir dnaos-frontend build
scripts.verify:backend: start-server-and-test "pnpm --dir dnaos-backend dev" http://127.0.0.1:5100/health "pnpm --dir dnaos-backend build"
scripts.verify:frontend: start-server-and-test "pnpm --dir dnaos-frontend dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000" http://127.0.0.1:3000 "pnpm --dir dnaos-frontend build"
